ppeo:hasSensorType.rdfs:label: Sensor Type
ppeo:hasSensorType.rdfs:comment: E.g., RGB camera, LiDAR, hyperspectral, thermometer, etc.

ppeo:hasAccessionNumber.rdfs:label: Sensor accession number
ppeo:hasAccessionNumber.rdfs:comment: Catalog or registry ID if applicable.

ppeo:isPartOf.rdfs:label: Part of Study
ppeo:isPartOf.rdfs:comment: Optional link to the parent Study by @id.

sosa:isHostedBy.rdfs:label: Hosted by Platform
sosa:isHostedBy.rdfs:comment: Platform on/with which this sensor is deployed.

sosa:observes.rdfs:label: Observes (properties / variables)
sosa:observes.rdfs:comment: Link to observed variables (pair with your observedVariable via ppeo<->sosa mapping).

ppeo:hasPart.rdfs:label: Associated Files
ppeo:hasPart.rdfs:comment: Datasheets, calibration files, spectral response curves, firmware notes, etc., that describe this sensor.
